title: Samudragupta becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Samudragupta was the second emperor of the Gupta Empire of ancient India.

title: Chandragupta II becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Chandragupta II, also known by his title Vikramaditya, as well as Chandragupta Vikramaditya, was an emperor of the Gupta Empire.

title: Chandragupta I becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Chandragupta I was a monarch of the Gupta Empire, who ruled in northern and central India.

title: Kumaragupta I becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Kumaragupta I was Gupta emperor from 415 until his death in 455.

title: Sri Gupta becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Gupta or Shrigupta was the founder of the Gupta dynasty of Magadha.

title: Ghatotkacha Gupta becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Ghatotkacha was a pre-imperial Gupta king of northern India.

title: Ramagupta becomes Gupta emperor
fact: Ramagupta, according to the Sanskrit play Devichandraguptam, was an emperor of the Gupta dynasty of northern India.
